Title: Relates to public notice and hearing prior to the imposition of new fees or surcharges by the New York state thruway authority
Summary: Requires public notice and hearing prior to the imposition of new fees, surcharges, or material change by the New York state thruway authority.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public authorities law, in relation to requiring public notice and hearing prior to the imposition of new fees or surcharges by the New York state thruway authority
